channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/27)
channel.description: 今天最热闹的，是AI编程工具链（Coding Agent）的疯狂进化。从Kimi、Codex到Claude，几乎每个热门Agent都有了新的开源项目加持，无论是提升透明度、增强记忆，还是直接操作手机，都能找到对应的工具。感觉今天不关注几个Coding Agent相关的项目，都不好意思说自己是技术人了。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天最热闹的，是AI编程工具链（Coding Agent）的疯狂进化。从Kimi、Codex到Claude，几乎每个热门Agent都有了新的开源项目加持，无论是提升透明度、增强记忆，还是直接操作手机，都能找到对应的工具。感觉今天不关注几个Coding Agent相关的项目，都不好意思说自己是技术人了。

item.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-code
item.description: The Starting Point for Next-Gen Agents | 近期热门 | 总 746 stars
item.author: MoonshotAI

item.title: 0xSero/codex-shim
item.description: Local Responses-API shim that exposes Factory BYOK models (and optional ChatGPT GPT-5.5 passthrough) to Codex Desktop. | 近期热门 | 总 637 stars
item.author: 0xSero

item.title: XingYu-Zhong/DeepSeek-GUI
item.description: AI agent workspace for DeepSeek models, with Code and Claw modes built into your application. | 近期热门 | 总 317 stars
item.author: XingYu-Zhong

item.title: jianshuo/ccglass
item.description: See what your coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Kimi) sends to the model — local proxy + web dashboard | 近期热门 | 总 307 stars
item.author: jianshuo

item.title: akitaonrails/ai-memory
item.description: Solution for long term memory for agent coding CLIs and to facilitate handoff between different agent vendors | 近期热门 | 总 290 stars
item.author: akitaonrails

item.title: matildagrahamgraham5131/FN-Panel-D-M-A-2026
item.description: A foundational toolkit and documentation base for analyzing game client behavior, enhancing security, and developing fair-play countermeasures. | 近期热门 | 总 246 stars
item.author: matildagrahamgraham5131

item.title: Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop
item.description: Hermes Agent CN desktop app, Windows-First, built with Tauri, Typescript and Rust. Isolated Hermes Agent core insides. | 近期热门 | 总 186 stars
item.author: Eynzof

item.title: DEEIX-AI/DEEIX-Chat
item.description: An enterprise AI workspace for model routing, multimodal chat, files, tools, billing, identity, and operations. | 近期热门 | 总 166 stars
item.author: DEEIX-AI

item.title: elliotgao2/handsets
item.description: A high-performance Android automation CLI, built for agents and humans | 近期热门 | 总 78 stars
item.author: elliotgao2

item.title: kldhsh123/Afterglow
item.description: 使用 QQ/微信 聊天记录结合向量数据库让AI更好的扮演对方的角色，在不微调模型的情况下可以达到可观的效果。把曾经的美好，续成往后的陪伴。 --续温 | 近期热门 | 总 47 stars
item.author: kldhsh123
